evidence.claim: The system allows viewing status per runway.
evidence.fact: The system shows a slot timetable per runway.
evidence.user_story_span: showing all allocated time slots, flight details, and status
evidence.fact_span: shows a slot timetable per runway

evidence.claim: The system allows viewing flight details per runway.
evidence.fact: The system shows a slot timetable per runway.
evidence.user_story_span: showing all allocated time slots, flight details, and status
evidence.fact_span: shows a slot timetable per runway

evidence.claim: The timetable must include allocated time slots.
evidence.fact: This system assigns departure and arrival slots while enforcing a minimum separation interval between consecutive uses of the same runway.

evidence.claim: The user is an air traffic controller accessing the runway management system.
evidence.fact: An airport slot coordinator that handles time allocation for inbound and outbound aircraft across two active runways, with built-in conflict detection and emergency override.
evidence.user_story_span: an air traffic controller accessing the runway management system
